meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't collaborate (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't collaborate. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Collaboration Issues
content.seo_description: Learn to implement seamless user onboarding to fix collaboration friction. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for your first app.
content.answer_block: Collaboration fails when users don't understand the environment. By implementing a structured, interactive onboarding flow using Antigravity and Claude Code, you eliminate friction, guide users through core features, and ensure they understand how to contribute. This creates a professional 'first-run' experience that turns lost newcomers into active, collaborating project contributors.
content.intro:
You’ve built the core logic, deployed the database, and pushed the code. But when you invite friends to test your app, they stare at a blank screen, lost in a labyrinth of features, eventually dropping off without making a single contribution. This isn't a code bug; it's a design failure. Your users don't know how to collaborate because you haven't shown them the 'why' and the 'how'.

In the world of SaaS, onboarding is the bridge between a visitor and a power user. Today, we’re going to dismantle that barrier. Using Antigravity for rapid UI iteration and Claude Code for automated logic implementation, we will build an onboarding sequence that turns your app from a lonely sandbox into a collaborative powerhouse. Let’s ship it.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before writing code, map out the three critical actions a user must take to collaborate effectively. This prevents feature bloat.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current app functionality and propose a 3-step interactive onboarding flow that teaches users how to create a workspace, invite a peer, and perform an initial collaborative edit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze project structure and identify optimal entry points for onboarding components'

steps.title: Build the Onboarding Overlay
steps.description: Create a non-intrusive modal that triggers on the first login to set expectations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable React onboarding modal component that uses state management to track progress through a 3-step tour of my app's UI.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate onboarding-modal.tsx with Tailwind CSS styling and framer-motion transitions'

steps.title: Implement Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Use tooltips to highlight specific buttons only when they are relevant to the user's current task.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a context-aware tooltip hook that displays helpful hints when the user hovers over the 'Invite Collaborator' button.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create useTooltip hook and integrate it into the dashboard component'

steps.title: Add a 'First-Run' Action Trigger
steps.description: Programmatically force the user to complete one collaborative task to 'unlock' the rest of the application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an onboarding state machine that prevents navigation until the user successfully invites their first teammate.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement protected route logic that checks onboarding completion status in the database'

steps.title: Validate and Deploy
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding experience is performant and doesn't conflict with existing collaborative web-socket logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current onboarding flow for potential race conditions with existing WebSocket connections and suggest fixes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'run test suite and check for performance bottlenecks in the new onboarding flow'

pro_tips: Never force a tour longer than three steps; users will bounce if the friction is too high.
Use local storage to cache onboarding progress so users can resume if they refresh the page.
Include a 'Skip' button on every slide to respect the time of power users who already know your tool.
Trigger the onboarding flow based on user behavior (e.g., clicking a specific feature) rather than just on page load.
Add a 'Completion Reward' like a badge or a visual celebration effect to provide dopamine hits for finishing the setup.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, analyze your user analytics to see where they drop off. Iterate on the copy of your tooltips, and start building your next feature module.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to turn any app into a collaborative hub. Don't let your code go unseen—apply these principles, refine your UX, and start collecting user feedback to scale your project. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
